Name: VM Operator - No Delete
Description: Can start, restart, and deallocate virtual machines. Cannot delete VMs, modify VM configuration, or manage access control. Models a helpdesk/operations role that needs power-state control without infrastructure-destructive permissions.
_notes: Replace <YOUR_SUBSCRIPTION_ID> with your actual subscription ID before deploying (az account show --query id). Note this role intentionally omits Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines/write and /delete - power actions like start/restart/deallocate are separate operations from the general write permission, so this role cannot reconfigure or destroy the VM.
